task_completion.description: Navigate to the living room in the 3D view of the sample house.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan software is open, showing the living room of the sample house in the 3D view.

task_completion.description: Create a custom rectangular rug in the center of the living room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new rectangular floor area or object is visible in the center of the living room floor.

task_completion.description: Ensure the rug is an area rug that leaves a visible border of the original flooring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rectangular rug does not extend to the walls; there is a clear, visible border of the original flooring around all edges of the rug.

task_completion.description: Apply a distinct carpet or fabric texture to the rug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The texture of the rug area is clearly different from the surrounding original floor, appearing specifically as a carpet or fabric material.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the 3D view to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\rug_design.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, or file explorer confirms the 3D view image is saved exactly to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\rug_design.png.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used DreamPlan's built-in tools to create the rug.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with DreamPlan's floor editing, drawing, or texture tools, rather than using an external image editor like MS Paint to draw a rectangle on a screenshot.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot is generated from the software's actual 3D view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot matches the DreamPlan rendering style and shows the Contemporary House sample project, not a generic image downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created a distinct area rug rather than just changing the entire room's floor texture.
integrity.visual_evidence: The original floor texture is still visible around the new rug; the agent did not simply use the paint tool to change the entire living room floor to carpet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The software used is DreamPlan. The task requires creating an area rug in the living room of the Contemporary House sample project. Scoring criteria: 20 points for saving the screenshot to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\rug_design.png, 40 points for the rug being visible in the 3D view, 30 points for confirming it is an area rug (leaves a visible border of the original flooring), and 10 points for the rug having a distinct carpet or fabric texture.
